since_last: 74% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 74% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.86% · BTC +0.40% · Gold +1.50% · Nasdaq100 +1.55%. 74% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.11%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.11%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +10.09%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +10.09%, ANET +7.85%, AMD +7.68%, SOUN +7.40%, INOD +6.98%. Laggards: AVAV -7.35%, SPCX -2.93%, UPST -2.46%, SNAP -2.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.93% at $157.26
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.93% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
